record.field:
ctx = dict(env.context or {}) Project = env['project.project'] my_project_domain = ['|', ('manager_id', '=', env.uid), '|', ('owner_id', '=', env.uid), ('user_id', '=', env.uid)] my_projects = Project.search(my_project_domain, limit=2)
if len(my_projects) == 1: project = my_projects[0] direct_action = project.action_open_exec_wbs() action_ctx = Project._normalize_action_context(direct_action.get('context')) action_ctx.update(ctx) action_ctx['default_project_id'] = project.id action_ctx['search_default_project_id'] = project.id direct_action['context'] = action_ctx direct_action['domain'] = [('project_id', '=', project.id)] action = direct_action else: next_action = env['ir.actions.act_window']._for_xml_id('smart_construction_core.action_sc_project_list') next_ctx = Project._normalize_action_context(next_action.get('context')) next_ctx.update(ctx) next_ctx['search_default_filter_my_projects'] = 1 next_ctx['sc_exec_entry_mode'] = 'wbs' next_action['context'] = next_ctx action = { 'type': 'ir.actions.client', 'tag': 'display_notification', 'params': { 'title': '执行结构', 'message': '请先选择项目，再进入执行结构。', 'type': 'warning', 'sticky': False, 'next': next_action, } }
